message:
fix(queries): also fall through on empty wisps results for ephemeral filter

The ephemeral filter path in SearchIssues fell through to the issues
table only on error, but not on empty results. This could mask scenarios
where the wisps table exists but is empty, preventing fallback to
ephemeral rows in the issues table. Align with the allEphemeral(IDs)
path which already checks both conditions.

Follow-up to #2161.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
